title: Always Sprint
description: This Mod allows the Players to always sprint without needing a Keybind
body:
# Always Sprint

**[WARNING]:** Do not use this Mod on Servers with ANTICHEAT. (I'm trying to fix this problem, but until then it may result in Bans)

This is a Minecraft Fabric-Mod, that allows the Player to sprint always. They do not need an assigned sprint key and won't have to toggle sprint after every Death.
